criteria.text: GET /api/financials returns a new cashFlow object alongside unchanged weekly/daily/revenue/receivables (additive)
cashFlow.weekly = {inflow,outflow,net} last vs prior week + cashFlow.mtd; inflow=sum deposits, outflow=sum purchases, net=in-out; windows via financePeriods in practice timezone
Cash-flow outflow INCLUDES fixed-cost-account purchases (total cash out, distinct from variableSpend which excludes them)
Empty/missing deposits or purchases degrades cashFlow to zeroed inflow/outflow/net; never 500s; deposits/spend/revenue/receivables unaffected
Financials page renders net cash-flow KPI tile (Monday: last week+WoW; Weekday: MTD) + inflow-vs-outflow breakdown; direction color-blind-safe (text+icon); no $-prefixed figures
Reading /api/financials records an audit entry (method/path/status/ms) with no financial values
Cash-flow computation errors log references/status only; never deposit/purchase amounts or payloads

Fixtures mode: existing deposits.json/purchases.json drive cashFlow; characterization+transforms tests pin inflow/outflow/net math incl fixed-cost inclusion + additive contract; npm test passes offline
